title: Run Your First Container
description:
## Run a Detached Container

Start a web server container from the **`nginx:alpine`** image.

**Requirements:**
1. The container must be named **`web`**
2. It must run in the **background** (detached)
3. It must be **running** when you validate

> 💡 `docker run -d` starts a container detached. Use `--name` to give it a fixed name. Check it with `docker ps`.

hints.title: Run detached with a name
hints.body: The -d flag detaches; --name sets the container name so validation can find it.

hints.title: Confirm it's running
hints.body: List running containers to verify the name and status.

validation.description: Checks that a running container named 'web' exists and uses the nginx:alpine image.
